hero.title: Intelligent AI employees for every area.
hero.description: From phone and chat to social media, sales and the automation of your workflows — we tailor every solution to you and build it into your day-to-day.

list.title: Seven ways to take work off your plate.

items.name: Voice Agent
items.summary: A phone assistant that answers every call around the clock — so no appointment and no customer is ever lost. It works like a real employee, for any industry.
features: Keeps customer data up to date

items.name: Chat Agent
items.summary: A modern chatbot for your website or app that advises, sells and answers enquiries instantly.

items.name: Social Media Agent
items.summary: An agent that runs your social channels and takes over the daily work.

items.name: Sales & Outreach Agent
items.summary: An agent that finds the right customers, scores them and prepares the personal outreach — all by itself.
features: Keeps customer data up to date

items.name: Automation
items.summary: We take over repetitive tasks and connect your programs into smooth workflows.

items.name: Custom AI Agents
items.summary: For special cases we build a solution entirely your way. We check together what's possible — there are almost no limits.

items.name: Website Creation
items.summary: Modern company websites and landing pages that turn visitors into customers — connected to your agents on request.

philosophy.headline: We build digital employees.
philosophy.body: Our AI agents take over repetitive tasks, support your team and free up time for what really matters. Every solution is planned individually and tailored precisely to your day-to-day — with the goal of making your business more successful for the long term.

items.q: How quickly is an AI agent ready?
items.a: Usually within 3 business days. With custom development it can take up to 10 business days.

items.q: Does it work with our existing programs?
items.a: Yes. We connect your agents to your phone, customer system, calendar, email and almost any other program you use.
Yes. Data protection, clear access rights and traceability are part of every solution — with data kept in Germany/EU on request.

items.q: What if we need something very specific?
items.a: Then we check together whether it's feasible and, if needed, build a fully custom solution. There are almost no limits.

items.q: What does an AI agent cost?
items.a: There's no one-size-fits-all price — it varies from agent to agent, depending on scope and effort. Just get in touch and we'll put together a transparent offer.
